attempts.name: preflight-1-invalid-approval-flag
attempts.command_shape: codex exec --ephemeral --skip-git-repo-check -a never -s read-only -C <temp> "Reply with exactly OK."

attempts.name: preflight-2-readonly-state-db
attempts.command_shape: codex exec --ephemeral --skip-git-repo-check -s read-only -C <temp> "Reply with exactly OK."
attempts.blocked_reason: default CODEX_HOME cannot open the state database for writing and fails to initialize the in-process app-server client
attempts.stderr_excerpt: attempt to write a readonly database; failed to initialize in-process app-server client: Operation not permitted

attempts.name: preflight-3-writable-codex-home-network-blocked
attempts.command_shape: CODEX_HOME=<temp>/codex-home codex exec --ignore-user-config --ephemeral --skip-git-repo-check -s read-only -C <temp> "Reply with exactly OK."
attempts.blocked_reason: moving CODEX_HOME to a writable temp directory bypasses the readonly state-db issue, but the writer sandbox still cannot resolve or reach api.openai.com
attempts.stderr_excerpt: failed to lookup address information ... api.openai.com/v1/responses

observations: A real Codex warning reported that the skills listing exceeded the 2 percent budget, all descriptions were removed, and additional skills were omitted from the model-visible list.
The raw command logs were captured outside the worktree and reduced to these redacted excerpts before committing.
